name: Puppycraft: Maze
short_description: A turn-based strategic duel where you command a tactical cat against AI dog armies on a 7x7 dynamic board; Deploy 10 unique barriers per match to build evolving mazes while racing to breakthrough enemy lines; Victory demands razor-sharp calculation of distance optimization and resource management.
detailed_description:
Cat vs Dog War: Ultimate Strategy Showdown! Cute Pets, Brutal Brain Battles

——Only 5% Global Clear Rate! Dare to Enter This "Adorable Hell"?

Core Gameplay
Become a tactical cat commander on a 7x7 strategic board, battling evil dog forces. Calculate every move, deploy maze walls to trap enemies, and outsmart their formations. One wrong step, and your paws will be forever locked in canine fortresses!

Developer's Manifesto
"We craft the cutest looks and the cruelest traps—victorious players' neural synapse density will surpass chess grandmasters!"
